# Size

**Data field**

A 32-bit unsigned integer that indicates the size in bytes of the atom structure.

## Data fields

- **Type**: A 32-bit unsigned integer value.
- **Metadata key table**: An array of metadata key atoms.

items.description: An array of metadata key atoms.
